Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Maloney's Mechanism Ornate Quiver Unique ID: 87b311606fe3f8e6b5425b8027d7d5b8e83a729e7f89cbf8df68410a3e0c0306 Item Level: 85 Quality: 0 Sockets: G-B-B LevelReq: 45 Implicits: 1 Has 1 Socket Has 2 Sockets Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown 10% increased Attack Speed +69 to maximum Life 5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

Rarity: RARE Spirit Spire Convening Wand Unique ID: 4aa5950f81425ec350d811a36626e15ff1be134ef9850fbca2400dd82bac5431 Item Level: 84 Quality: 30 Sockets: W-W-W LevelReq: 78 Implicits: 5 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality 12% increased Cast Speed 10% chance to gain an Endurance Charge on Kill Enemies you Kill have a 15% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage 69% increased Spell Damage +26% to Damage over Time Multiplier +38% to Physical Damage over Time Multiplier 32% increased Cast Speed +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems +1 to Level of all Physical Spell Skill Gems Gain 5% of Non-Chaos Damage as extra Chaos Damage
